expectations.evidence: Section 6 Strategy Matrix has 2D pain/persona grid crossing 3 personas with 5 awareness stages

expectations.text: Names specific messaging angles (not just topics)
expectations.evidence: 8 named angles A1-A8 e.g. 'The Mirror', 'Narrative Spine', 'Say The Thing', 'Amortized Grant'

expectations.text: Uses canonical RP personas (ED / Founder / Org-in-transition) rather than inventing new ones
expectations.evidence: Invents three new persona names: Story Carrier, Second Chapter ED, Pitch-Fatigued Operator

expectations.text: Names Mirror tier explicitly and maps angles to it
expectations.evidence: Title names 'Mirror-Tier Single-Session ($900-$1,800)' and all angles map to Mirror throughout

expectations.text: Names specific ED-level pains (not generic 'needs better marketing')
expectations.evidence: 8 specific pains: mission drift, board-staff misalignment, ED burnout carrying story, grant fatigue, post-crisis reset
